title: Pearls of the Deep
director: Vera Chytilová, Jaromil Jires, Jirí Menzel
writer: Bohumil Hrabal, Jirí Menzel, Jan Nemec
actors: Pavla Marsálková, Ferdinand Kruta, Emil Iserle
plot: Set against the backdrop of a repressed Czechoslovakia, five non-related vignettes are presented, each showcasing the need and want for human connection. In "Mr. Baltazar's Death", a middle aged couple who are experts at mechanics...
